entities.name: Rebecca Clarke
entities.context: Rebecca Clarke (1886-1979) was Stanford's first female composition student, one of the first professional women orchestral musicians

entities.name: Ernest Bloch
entities.context: they gave the prize to Ernest Bloch anyway. Critics then speculated 'Rebecca Clarke' must be Bloch's pen name

entities.name: James Friskin
entities.context: Found 'deep satisfaction and equilibrium' in marriage to James Friskin (1944) but stopped composing

entities.name: Lionel Tertis
entities.context: Lionel Tertis (Clarke's teacher) called his memoir 'Cinderella No More'—the man who made viola a legitimate solo instrument

entities.name: Viola Sonata
